trivia_bullets.text: Sultai Banner represents the Sultai Brood, Tarkir's necromantic ruling clan whose core identity is ruthlessness. Clan symbol is the dragon's fang; mechanic is Delve. The naga ruling caste controls sibsig (undead) armies; Khan Sidisi, Blood Tyrant, leads the clan.

"Power to dominate, cruelty to rule." No speaker attributed. Of the five banner mottos, Sultai's is the only one that names cruelty as an explicit virtue, reflecting the Sultai lore identity: they do not merely defeat enemies, they subjugate and exploit them.

Illustrated by Daniel Ljunggren. The art embeds Sultai iconography directly into the physical object: the banner pole is topped with a serpentine or naga skull finial, reflecting the naga ruling caste's reptilian identity. Carries the sultai clan watermark.

Sultai Banner has an EDHREC rank of 16,307 — the lowest inclusion rate among the four banners in this wave. Sultai commanders tend to be graveyard-centric and often have access to stronger fixing options, which may suppress Banner adoption in that color identity.

related_cards.name: Sultai Charm
related_cards.note: Sultai-aligned instant; thematic parallel in the clan cycle
